## Checklist

- [ ] My folder is named `My Name Themes` (ends with " Themes", plural)
- [ ] My CSS file is inside a theme subfolder, not at my contributor folder root
- [ ] My CSS has all four required metadata fields: `@name`, `@author`, `@version`, `@description`
- [ ] Any images are hosted in this repo — no Imgur or external URLs in my CSS
- [ ] I have not edited `README.md`, `theme-authors.json`, `scripts/`, or `.github/`
- [ ] If I included an `AUTHOR.md`, it has a `# Your Name` H1 heading (24 characters or fewer)

---
